requirement_topic.en: EVN Grid Supply and MOIT Charging-Station Rules
requirement_topic.zh: EVN 供电接入及 MOIT 充电站规则
requirement_topic.zht: EVN 供電接入及 MOIT 充電站規則

summary.en: Vietnam charging-station deployment can involve electricity-sector, tariff, metering, site-supply, and operator requirements overseen by MOIT and implemented through EVN or the relevant electricity supplier. These requirements sit beside product technical conformity and are normally handled at project or operator level. A proposed citation to Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN as mandating Group-2 metrological control for EV charging meters in commercial transactions could not be verified from official-source searches as of 2026-06-13.
summary.zh: 越南充电站部署可能涉及由 MOIT 主管并通过 EVN 或相关供电方执行的电力行业、资费、计量、现场供电和运营方要求。这些要求与产品技术符合性并行，通常在项目或运营方层面处理。截至 2026-06-13，未能通过官方来源检索核实关于 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 要求商业交易中的电动汽车充电计量装置纳入第二类计量管理这一拟议引用。
summary.zht: 越南充電站部署可能涉及由 MOIT 主管並通過 EVN 或相關供電方執行的電力行業、資費、計量、現場供電和營運方要求。這些要求與產品技術符合性並行，通常在項目或營運方層面處理。截至 2026-06-13，未能通過官方來源檢索核實關於 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 要求商業交易中的電動汽車充電計量裝置納入第二類計量管理這一擬議引用。

standards_or_laws: MOIT electricity-sector instruments for EV charging activities
EVN or local electricity supplier site-supply and metering process
Project-specific grid capacity and protection review

summary.en: China GB-standard charger files, GB/T 18487 evidence, and domestic grid-connection records do not replace Vietnamese electricity-supply coordination, metering, tariff, or site energization steps.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 标准充电桩文件、GB/T 18487 证据和国内并网记录不能替代越南供电协调、计量、资费或现场送电步骤。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 標準充電樁文件、GB/T 18487 證據和國內併網記錄不能替代越南供電協調、計量、資費或現場送電步驟。

gap.en: The exporter should support the Vietnamese owner with load schedules, single-line diagrams, protection settings, harmonic and power-quality data, metering interface information, commissioning procedures, and maintenance documentation suitable for EVN or the local supplier review. Do not rely on the unverified Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN metrology citation without an official text.
gap.zh: 出口商应向越南业主提供适用于 EVN 或当地供电方审查的负荷表、单线图、保护设定、谐波及电能质量数据、计量接口信息、调试程序和维护文件。在取得官方文本前，不应依赖未经核实的 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 计量引用。
gap.zht: 出口商應向越南業主提供適用於 EVN 或當地供電方審查的負荷表、單線圖、保護設定、諧波及電能質量數據、計量介面資訊、調試程序和維護文件。在取得官方文本前，不應依賴未經核實的 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 計量引用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charging site needs electricity supply, metering, tariff treatment, or grid energization approval; exact route is project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: China GB-standard compliance does not satisfy Vietnam MOIT / EVN operator or site energization requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product test reports do not close the Vietnamese grid and operating gap. EVN or local-supplier coordination and MOIT-relevant project documentation should be planned before shipment; the proposed Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN EV-metering claim could not be verified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品测试报告不能覆盖越南电网和运营差距。出货前应规划 EVN 或当地供电方协调及 MOIT 相关项目文件；关于 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 电动汽车充电计量的拟议说法未能核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品測試報告不能覆蓋越南電網和營運差距。出貨前應規劃 EVN 或當地供電方協調及 MOIT 相關項目文件；關於 Circular 03/2024/TT-BKHCN 電動汽車充電計量的擬議說法未能核實。
